documentation.value: Prints the argument followed by a newline to standard output.
The value to print. Calls toString() on objects.
Returns a formatted string using the specified format string and arguments.
A format string with specifiers like %s, %d, %f, etc.
Arguments referenced by the format specifiers.
Parses the string argument as a signed decimal integer. Throws NumberFormatException if the string is not a valid integer.
The String containing the integer representation.
Sorts the specified array of objects according to the natural ordering or by the given comparator.
The array to be sorted.
Optional comparator to determine the order. If null, natural ordering is used.
Sorts the specified list according to the natural ordering or by the given comparator.
The list to be sorted.
Optional comparator to determine the order.
Appends the specified element to the end of this list.
The element to be appended to this list.
Associates the specified value with the specified key in this map. Returns the previous value associated with key, or null.
The key with which the specified value is to be associated.
The value to be associated with the specified key.
Returns the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if this map contains no mapping for the key.
The key whose associated value is to be returned.
Returns the greater of two values.
The first value.
The second value.
Returns the smaller of two values.
The first value.
The second value.
Returns a sequential ordered stream whose elements are the specified values.
The elements of the new stream.
Returns an Optional describing the given value, or an empty Optional if the value is null.
The possibly-null value to describe.
Causes the currently executing thread to sleep for the specified number of milliseconds.
The length of time to sleep in milliseconds.
Reads all lines from a file. Bytes are decoded into characters using the specified or default (UTF-8) charset.
The path to the file.
The charset to use for decoding. Defaults to UTF-8.
